title: [Verif] Lower simulation tests to HW modules
body:
Rename the *LowerFormalToHW* pass to *LowerTests* and make it handle `verif.simulation` ops in the same way it handles `verif.formal`. The only difference being the ports needed on the module, and the lack of symbolic value ops.

Also add a comment to the modules generate by this class to make finding them after Verilog emission easier. With these changes, a user can grep for "// SIMULATION TEST" or "// FORMAL TEST" across the generated Verilog files to find lit-style run lines for each test.
